mcnemar_test.interpretation: skill-scanner detected threats in 11 skills where semgrep found nothing. McNemar's chi2=9.09, p=0.0026. Significant at alpha=0.05.

bootstrap_ci_detection_rate.interpretation: Detection rate: skill-scanner 24.4% vs semgrep 0.0%. Difference: 24.4% (95% CI: [13.3%, 37.8%]). CI excludes 0 — difference is statistically significant.

cohens_kappa.interpretation: Cohen's kappa = 0.131 (slight agreement). Precision: 9.1%, Recall: 100.0%, F1: 0.17. Scanner flags 10 FPs out of 44 clean skills on curated corpus.
